title: Custom Zone: Louis Vuitton-Themed Birthday
description: Custom zone at a Louis Vuitton-themed birthday party in Krasnoyarsk. Live painting of accessories and gifts for guests in the brand's aesthetic.

details.task: Organize a custom zone at a private event — a Louis Vuitton-themed birthday party in Krasnoyarsk.
details.solution: Set up a full workshop at the venue. Artists painted accessories and gifts for guests in the Louis Vuitton aesthetic.
details.result: Over 50 custom pieces for guests. The activation became the highlight of the evening and received rave reviews.
